title: My maid of honor grabbed the mic at my rehearsal dinner and read my fiance's texts out loud
script: My maid of honor found my fiance's phone unlocked at the rehearsal dinner, and what she saw made her walk straight to the microphone. I was three hours from married. She didn't warn me, she just tapped her glass, said she had a toast, and started reading his texts out loud to a woman named Priya, texts from that same morning. Names, a hotel room number, and one line that said his wife-to-be would never check. My mother started crying into her napkin. His mother stood up and walked out of the room. I sat there in my white rehearsal dress and watched two hundred faces change at once. My fiance grabbed the mic and swore it was fake, that Priya was just a coworker, that my maid of honor was jealous and had too much wine. Then his phone lit up again, face up on the table, and this time the whole room read the notification themselves.
